name: AcceptanceTestEntity

fields.name: id
fields.description: Primary key - implicitly accept: create (can set on POST, stripped on PUT)

fields.name: normalField
fields.description: Normal field - default accept (accepted on both POST and PUT)

fields.name: createOnlyField
fields.description: Immutable after creation - accepted on POST, stripped on PUT

fields.name: neverAcceptedField
fields.description: Server-managed field - stripped from both POST and PUT

description: Test entity for validating accept field control (input acceptance)
